_comment: agy-bridge config. Tasks resolve a CAPABILITY -> ordered candidate models (or an explicit chain override). The bridge tries each; first success wins; if all fail it exits 3 with a claude_fallback sentinel. Every model has a per-Mtok price (model_prices) so cost/savings are computed honestly for ALL backends, including subscription ones (NOT $0).
_agy_note: agy ids = EXACT `agy models` display strings; agy SILENTLY routes an unknown id to a default, so run.py refuses any id not in known_agy_models. agy token usage is NOT exposed by the CLI -> agy token counts are ESTIMATED (chars/4, flagged). agy auth is flaky per-call (auth-blip -> run.py retries once).
_zai_note: zai = z.ai GLM Coding Plan (subscription, Anthropic-compatible). Token in ZAI_API_TOKEN or token.env. Real server -> exact usage in response, and it ERRORS on a bad model id (no silent fallback).
_agy_models_seen: 2026-06-24: Gemini 3.5 Flash (Low/Med/High), Gemini 3.1 Pro (Low/High), GPT-OSS 120B (Medium), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Thinking), Claude Opus 4.6 (Thinking).
_time_routing_note: off | advisory | on. Now 'on' because the zai/GLM peak window is VERIFIED from the z.ai dashboard (not a guess). It acts ONLY on verified windows: agy's peak_wib is EMPTY (unverified) so agy is never demoted until `--analyze` provides measured data. Soft-demote: an in-peak backend sinks to the back of its chain but is still tried before the Claude fallback.

quota._source: z.ai dashboard 2026-06-24: GLM-5.2/GLM-5-Turbo share one usage quota; peak 14:00-18:00 UTC+8 = 13:00-17:00 WIB.
quota._promo_note: Off-peak charged 1x (not 2x) through end of Sep 2026; after that set offpeak to 2x. Peak is always 3x.

model_prices._unit: USD per 1,000,000 tokens, [input, output]. List/published rates as of 2026-06-24. Subscription backends are NOT free; this is their per-Mtok equivalent.
model_prices._sources: Claude: metacto/tldl 2026. Gemini: ai.google.dev/pricing. GPT-OSS: pricepertoken. GLM: estimated ~2.6x cheaper than Gemini Pro (confirm at z.ai pricing).

subscriptions._note: Flat monthly outlay (USD). Context only: shown on the dashboard, NEVER folded into per-call cost as $0. You to confirm exact tiers.

peak_wib._note: Demote windows in WIB (UTC+7), [startHour, endHour) 24h. zai = VERIFIED from z.ai dashboard: 14:00-18:00 UTC+8 = 13:00-17:00 WIB (3x quota burn in peak vs 1x off-peak now). agy = EMPTY/unverified, so agy is NEVER demoted until `--analyze` gives measured data; this keeps 'on' acting ONLY on the verified GLM window.

capabilities._note: capability -> ordered backend+model candidates, grounded in model strengths/context. Tasks reference one of these. Cost is NOT the only axis here (context window + lineage matter); the cost dashboard reveals where a choice does/doesn't save vs its claude_fallback so chains can be retuned from data.
capabilities._bulk_cheap_note: KEPUTUSAN BRIAN 2026-07-04: Gemini Flash TETAP memimpin harvest walau cost log menunjukkan GLM lebih murah per-call. Alasan: subscription Gemini (agy) jarang kepake, jadi utilisasi subscription > penghematan per-call. JANGAN 'optimasi' ini balik ke GLM-first berdasarkan agy_usage_log saja.
capabilities.image: NOT handled by the bridge -> use the gemini-image skill (gemini-3-pro-image / imagen-4.0).

harvest.intent: Bulk read transcripts/MOM/Slack/Dashboard -> raw facts, no synthesis. Cheap + fast + big context.

critic.intent: Adversarial / cross-model second opinion. Three distinct lineages (GLM/GPT-OSS/Gemini) for genuine diversity.

research.intent: Deep-research fan-out / non-Claude reasoning for diversity. Strongest reasoning first.

draft.intent: Generate content drafts (social posts, SEO fixes, copy) on the cheap strong writer GLM 5.2; specialist agents call this for generation. Falls back to Claude sonnet for voice/quality.
